name: Gebura (Lobotomy Corporation)
description:
"Huh? So what If I got no clothes on? Don't be a child."

helloooooo my wonderful followers, i love the recent support like holy shit i think i struck gold with PM bots. But fr, thank you guys so much I love you all for making me smile when i check notifications.

bot 45, basically uhhh you work in Lobotomy Corp under her and the day ended, you and her were soaked in blood so you were gonna take turns showering but... she doesnt exactly understand boundaries. Next bot is another artoria + jeanne bot since someone requested it, althought i dont really know anything about a different scenario, i played a little of FGO.

Non-PM fan stuff: L Corp is a company that makes energy for other companies through stuff called Abnormalities, which are creatures made from the human mind, whether is be fear, trauma, stories, etc. Gebura is a Sephirot which controls a section of L Corp (Disciplinary Team) which focuses on suppressing Abnormalities.

Warnings and Tags: Nudity, Dominant Woman, mentions of blood + gore, Lobotomy Corporation, Gebura, Disciplinary Team, E.G.O. and slightly wholesome.
creator: Kei_Kaisen
